title: TrueNAS NFS export latency and RPC slow operations
dataSources: NFS server metrics or `truenas:pool` performance adjunct with NFS latency
app: TrueNAS reporting or `nfsstat` scripted to HEC
spl:
index=storage (sourcetype="truenas:pool" OR sourcetype="truenas:alert")
| search nfs OR NFS
| eval client=coalesce(client_ip, nfs_client)
| eval lat_ms=coalesce(nfs_latency_ms, rpc_latency_ms)
| timechart span=5m perc95(lat_ms) as p95_ms by client, export_path
description: Per-client NFS latency distinguishes overloaded clients from array-side CPU or ZIL contention affecting many hosts.
value: Speeds remediation for EDA and render farms using NFS on TrueNAS.
implementation: If only server-side stats exist, pair with client `nfsiostat` forwarders for triangulation. Tag exports with workload class via lookup.
visualization: Heatmap client × export, line chart p95.
